_comment: SQL templates Vault runs to issue/revoke a dynamic credential. {{owner}} is substituted with the bounded context's group role (catalog_owner, orders_owner, ...). The {{name}}/{{password}}/{{expiration}} placeholders are interpolated by Vault itself, not us.
creation_statements:
CREATE ROLE "{{name}}" WITH LOGIN PASSWORD '{{password}}' VALID UNTIL '{{expiration}}' INHERIT IN ROLE {{owner}};
ALTER ROLE "{{name}}" SET ROLE = {{owner}};
revocation_statements: REASSIGN OWNED BY "{{name}}" TO {{owner}}; DROP OWNED BY "{{name}}"; DROP ROLE "{{name}}";
